pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 17.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in newer JDKs.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in JDK 17+ environments relying on Jakarta EE; code using javax.annotation will fail to compile or link if the dependency is not updated to the jakarta namespace.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag.
Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with JDK 17.

registry-core-elasticsearch/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate annotation dependency from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Java 17.
registry-core-elasticsearch/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is removed from the JDK module path in Java 11+ and often causes compile errors or classpath conflicts in Java 17 environments that expect Jakarta namespaces.

registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for logging message construction.
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.before: logger.debug(String.format("@Retryable 'searchId(resourceType=%s, ids={%s})'", resourceType, String.join(",", Arrays.stream(fields).map(keyValue -> keyValue.getField() + "=" + keyValue.getValue()).collect(Collectors.toSet()))));

registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.before: throw new IllegalArgumentException(String.format("Quantity should be up to %s.", maxQuantity));
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.after: throw new IllegalArgumentException("Quantity should be up to %s.".formatted(maxQuantity));

registry-core-helper/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation package in Java 17.
registry-core-helper/pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 17 as it was removed from the JDK module system.

registry-core-jms/src/main/java/gr/uoa/d.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.

registry-core-rest/src/main/java/gr/uoa/.general_idea: Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for string interpolation.

registry-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate annotation dependency from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace required by Java EE/Jakarta EE standards in newer environments.
registry-core/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation-api artifact is deprecated and often unavailable or incompatible in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code using javax annotations will fail to compile or link if the classpath only provides jakarta annotations.
